title: Oh What A Night
description:
Returning to The Malthouse in 2026 due to popular demand!

OH WHAT A NIGHT! takes you back in time on a musical journey through the incredible career of Frankie Valli & The Four Seasons, now immortalised in the multi-award winning show Jersey Boys, which has been packing theatres worldwide since its debut in 2005.

Valli’s unmistakable voice dominated the airwaves for more than two decades with classics such as Sherry, Let’s Hang On, Big Girls Don’t Cry, Can’t Take My Eyes Off You, My Eyes Adored You, December 63 (Oh What A Night), Bye Bye Baby, Who Loves You and many, many more.

With a repertoire that needs no introduction, OH WHAT A NIGHT! combines infectious personalities, amazing vocals, slick harmonies and even slicker dance moves to deliver a show full of energy and nostalgia which will leave you wanting more! Don’t miss the ultimate celebration of one of the world’s greatest Rock & Roll bands!

Event Type: Theatre

Running Time: 90 minutes

Company: Handshake Group
address: The Malthouse Theatre, Exact Address Not Provided

title: Man in the Mirror – A Tribute to Michael Jackson
description:
Join us for a Thriller of an evening, as we celebrate the legendary music of the KING OF POP.

This is the “Man in the Mirror” – The brand new must-see, electrifying tribute concert to Michael Jackson.

Starring CJ, one of the world’s greatest Michael Jackson Tribute Artists and supported by a talented cast of performers and musicians who capture the essence of Michael Jackson’s unique style and charisma like no other, in this scintillating production that will keep you on the edge of your seats.

Featuring all his greatest hits you know and love, including “Thriller,” “Billie Jean,” “Beat It,” “Smooth Criminal,” and of course, “Man in the Mirror.” Complete with dazzling choreography, stunning visual effects, light show and authentic costumes. This is the show that pays tribute to Jackson’s musical legacy.

So, whether you’re a lifelong fan or experiencing the magic of Michael Jackson for the first time, get ready as we take you back in time, for a night like no other.
address: The Malthouse Theatre, Exact Address Not Provided

title: The Americana Revue
description:
The Americana Revue is a unique, exciting new live music stage show celebrating many of the world’s best loved U.S. artists & some of the most inspiring songs of a generation. Two hours plus of timeless, multi-million selling #1 chart hits! Classic songs that have been the soundtrack to countless music fans’ lives for decades.

The Americana Revue features music by some of the greatest singer / songwriter icons of the 20th Century, including: Bruce Springsteen, Eagles, Tom Petty, Fleetwood Mac, Bob Dylan, Johnny Cash, Billy Joel, Tom Waits, Creedence Clearwater Revival, James Taylor, Bob Seger, Kenny Rogers, The Traveling Wilburys, Black Crowes, Lynyrd Skynyrd, ZZ Top & many others – performed with passion, heart & soul by a world class rockin’ band – guaranteed to deliver a fantastic show.

X Factor / international singing star Ben Mills is frontman / lead vocalist with The Americana Revue. The 9 x piece band also showcase 3 x amazing female vocalists – Abi Orfila and sisters Isabella Cowell & Sophia Jones.

Musical Director James Cassidy says – “The Americana Revue” is a culmination of years of travelling the ‘States & playing music inspired by our songwriting heroes – fascinating characters, great musicians & exhilarating performers. “Three Chords & the Truth” as Country songwriter Harlan Howard famously said in the ‘50’s. We all share a deep love & respect for Americana music & it’s a real joy to play our favourite songs with this amazing band.”

Additional Information: The theatre box office and bar will open one hour prior to show time for ticket collection, sales and refreshments. Wheelchairs: Please call the box office – 01227 287234 to book a wheelchair and companion seat. For blue badge holders parking will be made available.

Parking: The Theatre campus has very limited onsite parking available, parking any available spaces will be allocated on a first arrival basis. title: Hounds of Love – The Kate Bush Celebration
description:
Step into the ethereal world of Hounds Of Love – The Kate Bush Celebration, a tribute that faithfully recreates the artistry, passion, and magic of one of music’s most iconic and enigmatic performers. This stunning production brings to life Kate Bush’s ground breaking Tour of Life, the visionary 1979 tour that revolutionised live music with its fusion of theatre, dance, and multimedia storytelling. From her breath taking vocals to the intricate choreography and spellbinding visuals, every element is crafted with meticulous attention to detail, capturing the spirit, drama, and innovation that made Kate’s performances legendary.

Featuring a phenomenal live band and a performer who embodies Kate’s unmistakable voice, Hounds Of Love delivers authentic and heartfelt renditions of her timeless hits, spanning from The Kick Inside to Hounds of Love and beyond. Expect to be transported by unforgettable classics such as Wuthering Heights, The Man with the Child in His Eyes, Babooshka, Running Up That Hill, and of course, Hounds of Love.

But this is more than just a celebration of her most famous songs—it’s also a chance to experience the deeper cuts and musical treasures that never had their moment on stage. From the theatrical masterpieces of Never for Ever to the cinematic soundscapes of The Sensual World, this show honours the full spectrum of Kate’s genius, bringing some of her most beloved studio creations to life in a way they’ve never been heard before.

With a production that pays homage to Kate’s visionary approach to live performance, Hounds Of Love – The Kate Bush Celebration is a must-see for lifelong fans and newcomers alike. Immerse yourself in the soundscapes, stories, and spectacle of Kate Bush’s world—an experience that is as haunting, exhilarating, and otherworldly as the music itself.
address: The Malthouse Theatre, Exact Address Not Provided

title: MALTHOUSE COMEDY – WITH STEPHEN K AMOS, DAVID TSONOS, BLANK PENG & HOSTED BY CHRIS BROOKER
description:
With STEPHEN K AMOS, DAVID TSONOS, BLANK PENG & HOSTED BY CHRIS BROOKER!

Headlined by award-winning comedian Stephen K Amos! Stephen has charmed and entertained audiences all over the world with his natural, assured delivery and his honest, original material.

A gifted actor, Amos has impressed critics with his performances on stage and screen and has proved he is one of the most unique comedy voices of his generation but demonstrated a penchant for drama roles. Stephen can currently be seen in cinemas in Tim Burton’s Beetlejuice Beetlejuice. Comfortable as a performer, presenter, actor and guest there is no doubt that Amos will retain his position as one of the nation’s favourite comedians for a long time to come.

Stephen is currently on the Australian leg of his new tour Oxymoron. Stephen regularly features on TV and Radio, including QI, Pointless Celebrities, Mock The Week, Celebrity Great British Bake Off, Eastenders and recently took part in a new BBC Two series Pilgrimage The Road To Rome.

Aside from being one of the nation’s favourite faces on the television, Stephen is a prolific writer and performer, releasing a new hour long show every year and performing all over the world at festivals. He has performed in some of the UK’s most loved theatres and also appeared at the Royal Variety Show in 2007.

Opening the show is Canadian comic David Tsonos! If you want serious comedy, David is not your man. With his friendly and confident persona, he intrigues everyone with his combination of banter and impulsive comments. His comedy stems from being the youngest of five boys, babysitting… his nephews and his cat.

David started off in Canada and since making the UK his home, he has performed in over 15 countries. He has appeared at numerous fringe festivals in the UK including Edinburgh, Glasgow, Bath and Hastings and has performed overseas gigs in Bucharest, Dublin, Budapest, Malta, Amsterdam, Antwerp, Prague, Berlin, Guernsey, Oslo, Luxembourg and Brussels.

With one of the country’s most in-demand female comics right now, Blank Peng! Blank is making her mark as one of the UK’s most distinctive and compelling new comedy talents. She began her comedy journey performing stand-up in Mandarin before moving to London in 2022, committing herself to learning and mastering comedy in English. Since then, she has rapidly carved out a formidable reputation on the UK circuit, becoming a sought-after weekend act at the country’s leading comedy clubs.

Her sharp observations on culture, identity, and everyday life have quickly garnered her industry recognition. She was invited to perform on the Capital Xtra Comedy Gala and has tour-supported some of the country’s top comedians, including Babatunde Aléshé (Taskmaster), Nabil Abdulrashid(Britain’s Got Talent) , and Henning Wehn (Would I Lie to You). In 2025, she reached the London Finals of the BBC New Comedy Award and made her UK television debut on BBC Three. She has also lent her talents doing TV warm-up for The Last Leg on Channel 4.

Magnetic, sharp, and delightfully unexpected, Blank is effortlessly captivating audiences with every performance.

And hosted by the brilliant Chris Brooker! After a decade on the UK comedy circuit Chris has forged a fine reputation for himself as a stand-up comedian and compère. His versatility has seen him play to audiences of all sizes and backgrounds, winning them over with his infectious enthusiasm, swift wit and immense likeability. Dubbed comedy’s ginger Viking by a promoter, he really is a larger than life character.

Please note, that while we do our best to ensure that we deliver the published bill, line-ups can be subject to change at short notice.
address: The Malthouse Theatre, Exact Address Not Provided

title: Very Santana
description:
Join us for a musical time travel experience, where you can enjoy the beautiful guitar melodies and creatively diverse, challenging songs of Carlos Santana.

Our band consists of highly skilled and musically educated musicians who perform these pieces with excellence.

As hundreds of independent reviews have confirmed, it is an absolute delight to witness these virtuoso, Very Santana musicians playing their hearts out!

Our band performs live concert versions of the songs with a lot of extra improvisation. This ensures that each one stays fresh and delivers surprises, gig after gig, to those who endeavour return to our concerts every year more of the same. Many of our fans travel far and wide to follow our journey and enjoy our sensational shows. In return, we create wonderful memories of a unique "Santana Experience" for both our audience and ourselves.

This live experience spans the entire musical Carlos Santana legacy, including the early era songs from the Abraxas album such as Black Magic Woman, Oye Como Va, and Samba Pa Ti, through the LATE 70s hits such as Europa and She's Not There, to the MODERN ERA multi Grammy-awarded songs such as Smooth and Maria-Maria...

Very Santana recreate the guitar master and his band's live experience, with all the authenticity and uniqueness that made Carlos Santana a living legend musician and composer.

The all-analogue, warm, valve driven guitar sound (PRS, Gibson, Fibenare guitars + Mesa Boogie Mark I King Snake Carlos Santana Signature and Two-Rock amps), the drums, bass, Hammond organ, and plenty of percussion offer a truly unique music experience! The icing on the cake is our singer Amera's vocals and dance moves. Don't miss our show! Secure your tickets as soon as possible!
address: The Malthouse Theatre, Exact Address Not Provided

title: Bugsy Malone
description:
Presented by Gardner Hodges Entertainment

Alan Parker’s BUGSY MALONE comes to Canterbury for Summer 2026 in a glittering new immersive production, brought to you by the same team as the Malthouse Panto, starring Olivier Award-Winning ‘Game of Thrones’ star KERRY INGRAM as Tallulah.

Featuring an iconic score of hits by Paul Williams including ‘Fat Sam’s Grand Slam’, ‘Give a Little Love’, and ‘Tomorrow’ performed live by a sensational 10 piece orchestra and featuring an array of dazzling sets and costumes, this all-new immersive production will be just what you need to be ANYTHING YOU WANT TO BE this Summer.

A riotous pre-show of music, dancing and hilarity will commence half an hour before the listed curtain time. 1920s Dress for audiences members is strongly encouraged, but not compulsory.

Book by Alan Parker

Music and Lyrics by Paul Williams

By arrangement with Faber Music Ltd on behalf of Warner / Chappell Music Ltd

Event Type: Theatre

Running Time: 120 minutes

Company: Gardner Hodges Entertainment
address: The Malthouse Theatre, Exact Address Not Provided

title: Strictly Nashville
description:
Coming to The Malthouse in 2026 and celebrating the very best in music from America’s ‘Music City’ this show promises an exciting fusion of pure Country gold with ‘New Country’ blockbusters!

Guitarist, vocalist and band leader Bob Drury, who has been selling out in theatres across the country for the past 15 years with his highly acclaimed shows, heads up an amazing cast of musicians to deliver a set of pristine classics from the likes of Johnny Cash, Willie Nelson, Brad Paisley, Garth Brooks, Darius Rucker and Kenny Rogers.

Featuring Bob’s daughter Harriet on female lead vocals, the band presents stunning versions of monster hits from Shania Twain, Dolly Parton, Taylor Swift, Carrie Underwood, Trisha Yearwood, June Carter, and many more. Harriet is an established vocal performer with a “stunning, soaring voice” that will delight and captivate you! With their combined talents, Bob and Harriet also lovingly re-create vocal duets from Country’s Hall of Fame.

“A winner of a show guaranteed to blow your Stetsons off!” -Worcester News

“The father-daughter empathy is a joy to behold. Country music is nothing without the right feel and when Bob sings of trying to drink someone off his mind, you can almost smell the Tennessee whisky on his breath” – Somerset County Gazette

“Nashville may be a long way away, but thanks to the artistry of Bob Drury and his wonderful band, the great music city of Tennessee has moved just that little bit closer” -Watford Observer
address: The Malthouse Theatre, Exact Address Not Provided

title: The Dinosaur That Pooped A Rock Show!
description:
Based on the bestselling books by Tom Fletcher & Dougie Poynter

12.30pm & 3.30pm, Monday 10th August 2026

Brand New for 2026!

When Danny and Dino’s favourite rock band are playing their last ever concert, they go on a quest to get the last two tickets. But with a villainous band manager lurking, nothing goes to plan. Will the band perform? Will Danny rock out? Or will Dino’s rumbling tummy save the day?

Adapted from the number 1 best-selling books by Tom Fletcher and Dougie Poynter, the whole family will have a poopy good time enjoying a brand, new story for the stage. Featuring new songs by Tom and Dougie, a lot of laughs and a whole lot of poo!

Produced by Mark Thompson Productions Limited and Directed by Miranda Larson.

Event Type: Theatre

Running Time: 60 minutes

Company: Mark Thompson Productions

The theatre box office and bar will open 1 hour prior to show time for ticket collection, sales and refreshments.

Wheelchairs

For blue badge holders parking will be made available

The Theatre campus has very limited onsite parking available, parking any available spaces will be allocated on a first arrival basis. We recommend you use local car parks such as St Radigund’s (5-7 minute walk), Pound Lane (10 minute walk) Canterbury West (10-12 minute walk) or public transport.

We ask that you do not attend the theatre if you have tested positive for covid-19 and are within your 5 days of isolation. Mask wearing is no longer mandatory but we support an individuals choice to wear a mask throughout the building.

The theatre has a fresh air flow system which pumps fresh air from outside into the auditorium – this can mean if the outside air temperature is low the theatre can feel cool.

We can endeavour to resell your ticket, if the show is sold out. If your ticket is sold, we will refund the ticket value to the original payment method.

title: One Night in Dublin
description:
THE ULTIMATE SMASH-HIT IRISH MUSIC SHOW IS BACK!

Get ready for a night of laughter, love, music and mischief as One Night In Dublin returns with a brand-new show bursting with Irish charm.

Meet Danny, a whiskey-loving fisherman with the voice of an angel and his straight-talking wife Rosie. From the cobbled streets of Dublin to the cosy corners of Murphy’s Tavern, follow Danny as he dodges obstacles (including Rosie!) on his return home from sea in search of a pint and a grand night of craic with his friends.

A band of award-winning musicians, including live fiddle and accordion, cover all of your favourite sing-along Irish classics including Galway Girl, Tell Me Ma, The Irish Rover, Dirty Old Town, Whiskey In The Jar, The Wild Rover, Galway Shawl and more.

With songs by The Pogues, The Saw Doctors, The Dubliners, The Fureys, Flogging Molly, Nathan Carter, and The Dropkick Murphys, to name just a few, One Night In Dublin is a must-see for anyone who loves Irish music.

Join us for two hours of high-energy Irish music and feel-good fun because in Murphy’s Tavern it’s like St. Patrick’s night every night-with extra heart, humour, and a whole lot of hooley!

Cast subject to change

Event Type: Theatre

Running Time: 140 minutes

Company: Dublin Show Productions Ltd

title: Now That’s West End
description:
Join us for an extraordinary performance of magic at the musicals as Now That’s West End arrives to The Malthouse Theatre, for one dazzling night only.

Get ready to be swept away by the sensational tunes of your beloved musicals as our stellar cast delivers unforgettable performances that will leave you mesmerised. With songs from iconic West End musicals, Now That’s West End guarantees pure entertainment.

So, grab your seat, sit back, and immerse yourself in the timeless melodies of musical theatre, spanning from the classics to the latest chart-toppers.

Now That’s West End – the ultimate celebration of musical theatre awaits you!

title: Eric & Ern
description:
The Production Garden in association with Cube Room Productions presents an evening of ERIC & ERN with Ian Ashpitel and Jonty Stephens.

7.30pm Thursday 22nd October 2026

From the Olivier nominated duo behind the hugely celebrated critically acclaimed West End hit ERIC & LITTLE ERN.

This is a show for all the family from 8 to 80!

A brilliant homage crammed full of renditions of those famous comedy sketches, that hits all the right notes! Celebrating the Centenary year of the nations favourite comedy legends Morecambe & Wise!

From Greig’s Piano concerto to Mr Memory, “Arsenal!” It’s a show full of Morecambe and Wise’s most loved routines, songs and sketches.

This wonderful show evokes memories of times when whole families would huddle around the telly to watch those fantastic Christmas specials.

You’ll feel you’ve experienced the real thing and been taken back to a world of sunshine and laughter.

As seen on The One show BBC1 and The Alan Titchmarsh Show ITV.

Age guidance: 8+

title: The Dr Hook Songbook
description:
The songs of American country rock band, Dr. Hook, are timeless classics. Who can forget ‘Sylvia’s Mother’, ‘When You’re in Love With A Beautiful Woman’, ‘Sharing the Night Together’, ‘Only Sixteen’, ‘Sexy Eyes’ and ‘Cover of the “Rolling Stone”.

The Dr. Hook Songbook breathes new life into the Dr. Hook catalogue with their sensational live concert, recreated for the stage by talented young singer & songwriter, Billy Shannon, and his spectacular live band.

Book your tickets now and let’s share the night together.

title: The Opera Boys- The Farewell Tour Starring Paul Potts
description:
The Opera Boys-The Farewell Tour Starring Paul Potts

The powerhouse classical-crossover sensation The Opera Boys are thrilled to announce their final tour, featuring the world-renowned tenor and very first winner of Britain’s Got Talent, Paul Potts.

Following years of sold-out performances across the globe, The Opera Boys join forces with the man who captured the world’s heart with his legendary audition of “Nessun Dorma”. This collaboration promises an evening of soaring notes, impeccable harmonies, and the perfect blend of opera, musical theatre, and modern pop classics.

Paul Potts became a household name in 2007, winning the inaugural season of Britain’s Got Talent. Since then, he has released multi-platinum albums, performed over 1,500 shows in 45 countries, and inspired the Hollywood biopic One Chance.

The Opera Boys are a leading classical-crossover group featuring leading men from London’s West End and Broadway. They have performed for Royalty, appeared on national television, and performed to sold out theatres and concert halls worldwide, delivering immaculate four-part harmonies and solo performances, delivered in their inimitable style.

You do not want to miss this final tour, as it really is time to say goodbye!

Add a VIP experience to your ticket! Join Us for a VIP Meet and Greet Experience prior to the show

Please arrive for 5.45pm Includes a Signed Poster Per Person and a complimentary drink

Standard Tickets: Doors Open at 6.30pm Show starts at 7.30pm

title: Goldilocks And The Three Bears
description:
The greatest show in pantoland is coming to town as Goldilocks and the Three Bears tumbles into Canterbury this festive season! Watch in wonder as The Malthouse is spectacularly transformed into a marvellous, magical big top extravaganza, helmed once again by the incomparable Joseph Gardner Hodges, returning for his sensational sixth year as the outrageously fabulous Ringmaster Fanny! Prepare to be dazzled, delighted and thoroughly lost in the sparkle of the circus.

From the award-winning creative team behind our record-breaking productions of Sleeping Beauty, Peter Pan, Beauty and the Beast, Cinderella and Snow White, this year’s GOLDILOCKS is set to raise the tent poles even higher. Expect a show that’s bear-y magical and un-bear-ably funny, featuring a phenomenal West End cast, spectacular costumes, jaw-dropping special effects and laugh-out-loud comedy guaranteed to have the whole family roaring with joy. And with tickets from just £10.00, it’s a circus treat that won’t break the piggy bank.

Roll up for the fun, stay for the magic!

This pantomime is truly the greatest show!
address: The Malthouse Theatre, Exact Address Not Provided

title: CHITTY CHITTY BANG BANG
description:
CHITTYCHITTY BANG BANG flies into Canterbury in 2027!

Based on the beloved 1968 film version of Ian Fleming’s children’s book, and featuring an unforgettable score by the Sherman Brothers ( _Mary Poppins_), _ChittyChitty Bang Bang_ is one family-friendly blockbuster that audiences will find “Truly Scrumptious”.

An eccentric inventor, Caractacus Potts sets about restoring an old race car from a scrap heap with the help of his children Jeremy and Jemima. They soon discover the car has magical properties including the ability to float and take flight. Trouble occurs when the evil Baron Bomburst desires the magic car for himself. The family joins forces with Truly Scrumptious and batty Grandpa.

Mask Wearing & Covid-19

Mask wearing is no longer mandatory but we support an individuals choice to wear a mask throughout the building.

The theatre has a fresh air flow system which pumps fresh air from outside into the auditorium – this can mean if the outside air temperature is low the theatre can feel cool.

Refunds & Exchanges

The production company is not offering refunds unless the show is cancelled. Tickets can be changed for an alternative performance of the same show (subject to availability). We can endeavour to resell your ticket, if the show is old out. if your ticket is sold, we will refund the ticket value to the original payment method.

Dates & Times

Date: 17th-20th February 2027

Price: £10 to £25
address: The Malthouse Theatre, Exact Address Not Provided

title: CHITTY CHITTY BANG BANG
description:
CHITTYCHITTY BANG BANG flies into Canterbury in 2027!

Based on the beloved 1968 film version of Ian Fleming’s children’s book, and featuring an unforgettable score by the Sherman Brothers ( _Mary Poppins_), _ChittyChitty Bang Bang_ is one family-friendly blockbuster that audiences will find “Truly Scrumptious”.

An eccentric inventor, Caractacus Potts sets about restoring an old race car from a scrap heap with the help of his children Jeremy and Jemima. They soon discover the car has magical properties including the ability to float and take flight. Trouble occurs when the evil Baron Bomburst desires the magic car for himself. The family joins forces with Truly Scrumptious and batty Grandpa.

Event Type: Theatre

Running Time: 150 minutes

Company: JGH Associates

Additional Information

Wheelchairs

Please call the box office – 01227 287234 to book a wheelchair and companion seat.

For blue badge holders parking will be made available.

Parking

The Theatre campus has very limited onsite parking available, parking any available spaces will be allocated on a first arrival basis. We recommend you use local car parks such as St Radigund’s (5-7 minute walk), Pound Lane (10 minute walk) Canterbury West (10-12 minute walk) or public transport.

Mask Wearing & Covid-19

Mask wearing is no longer mandatory but we support an individuals choice to wear a mask throughout the building.

The theatre has a fresh air flow system which pumps fresh air from outside into the auditorium – this can mean if the outside air temperature is low the theatre can feel cool.

Refunds & Exchanges

The production company is not offering refunds unless the show is cancelled. Tickets can be changed for an alternative performance of the same show (subject to availability). We can endeavour to resell your ticket, if the show is old out. if your ticket is sold, we will refund the ticket value to the original payment method.

Dates & Times

Date: 17th-20th February 2027

Price: £10 to £25
address: The Malthouse Theatre, Exact Address Not Provided

address: The Malthouse Theatre, Exact Address Not Provided

title: Goldilocks And The Three Bears
description:
The greatest show in pantoland is coming to town as Goldilocks and the Three Bears tumbles into Canterbury this festive season! Watch in wonder as The Malthouse is spectacularly transformed into a marvellous, magical big top extravaganza, helmed once again by the incomparable Joseph Gardner Hodges, returning for his sensational sixth year as the outrageously fabulous Ringmaster Fanny! Prepare to be dazzled, delighted and thoroughly lost in the sparkle of the circus.

From the award-winning creative team behind our record-breaking productions of Sleeping Beauty, Peter Pan, Beauty and the Beast, Cinderella and Snow White, this year’s GOLDILOCKS is set to raise the tent poles even higher. Expect a show that’s bear-y magical and un-bear-ably funny, featuring a phenomenal West End cast, spectacular costumes, jaw-dropping special effects and laugh-out-loud comedy guaranteed to have the whole family roaring with joy. And with tickets from just £10.00, it’s a circus treat that won’t break the piggy bank.

Roll up for the fun, stay for the magic!

This pantomime is truly the greatest show!
address: The Malthouse Theatre, Exact Address Not Provided

Watch in wonder as The Malthouse is spectacularly transformed into a marvellous, magical big top extravaganza, helmed once again by the incomparable Joseph Gardner Hodges, returning for his sensational sixth year as the outrageously fabulous Ringmaster Fanny! Prepare to be dazzled, delighted and thoroughly lost in the sparkle of the circus.

From the award-winning creative team behind our record-breaking productions of Sleeping Beauty, Peter Pan, Beauty and the Beast, Cinderella and Snow White, this year’s GOLDILOCKS is set to raise the tent poles even higher. Expect a show that’s bear-y magical and un-bear-ably funny, featuring a phenomenal West End cast, spectacular costumes, jaw-dropping special effects and laugh-out-loud comedy guaranteed to have the whole family roaring with joy. And with tickets from just £10.00, it’s a circus treat that won’t break the piggy bank.

Roll up for the fun, stay for the magic!

This pantomime is truly the greatest show!
address: The Malthouse Theatre, Exact Address Not Provided

title: Natural Causes
description:
Vincent is a suicide consultant working for Exodus, a company promising: “A beautiful death. All perfectly natural”. Celia Bryce has been depressed for a long time, frequently talking about ending it all. Celia’s husband Walter, a writer, wants to help her depart this world with dignity. Angie is Walter’s ambitious secretary, and together they have a plan for Celia that implies a much darker agenda. Not just a peaceful end; a fresh start.

In this razor-sharp black comedy by Eric Chappell (the mastermind behind Rising Damp), the best-laid plans go hilariously wrong. With a rubber plant that’s seen better days, a Samaritan with quite enough of his own problems, and a suicide pact that isn’t all that it seems, the real question isn’t if someone will go – it’s who will be left standing.

A farce where the drinks are lethal, the motives are murderous, and the comedy is to die for!

This amateur production of “Natural Causes” is presented by arrangement with Concord Theatricals Ltd on behalf of Samuel French Ltd. www.concordtheatricals.co.uk

The Old Stagers have been performing in Canterbury every summer since 1842, stopping only for two world wars and one pandemic. Join us this summer for our 173rd season!

By long-standing tradition on Friday and Saturday night the show will be followed by The Epilogue, a short light-hearted revue performed by the cast and friends.
address: The Malthouse Theatre, Exact Address Not Provided

title: Fireman Sam Live! The Lost Pirate Treasure
description:
Fireman Sam Live! The Lost Pirate Treasure

12.30pm & 3.30pm, Tuesday 11th August 2026

Brand New for 2026.

Norman Price is determined to win the Pontypandy Treasure Hunt, but when he discovers clues to a real pirate treasure, he goes exploring deep into the caves. It’s up to Fireman Sam, Elvis and Ellie to save the day and find the treasure. With clues, pirate songs and plenty of swashbuckling adventure, Fireman Sam’s new live show is perfect for all budding pirates! Live Show Ahoy!

Produced by Mark Thompson Productions in partnership with Mattel. Directed by Miranda Larson.

Event Type: Theatre

Running Time: 60 minutes

Company: Mark Thompson Productions

The theatre box office and bar will open 1 hour prior to show time for ticket collection, sales and refreshments.

Wheelchairs

Please call the box office – 01227 287234 to book a wheelchair and companion seat

For blue badge holders parking will be made available

Parking

The Theatre campus has very limited onsite parking available, parking any available spaces will be allocated on a first arrival basis. We recommend you use local car parks such as St Radigund’s (5-7 minute walk), Pound Lane (10 minute walk) Canterbury West (10-12 minute walk) or public transport.

Mask Wearing & Covid-19

We ask that you do not attend the theatre if you have tested positive for covid-19 and are within your 5 days of isolation. Mask wearing is no longer mandatory but we support an individuals choice to wear a mask throughout the building.

The theatre has a fresh air flow system which pumps fresh air from outside into the auditorium – this can mean if the outside air temperature is low the theatre can feel cool.

Refunds & Exchanges

The production company is not offering refunds unless the show is cancelled. Tickets can be changed for an alternative performance of the same show (subject to availability). We can endeavour to resell your ticket, if the show is sold out. If your ticket is sold, we will refund the ticket value to the original payment method.

Prices

Adult £18, Child £17, Family of 4 £61.50
address: The Malthouse Theatre, Exact Address Not Provided

title: CHITTY CHITTY BANG BANG
description:
CHITTYCHITTY BANG BANG flies into Canterbury in 2027!

Based on the beloved 1968 film version of Ian Fleming’s children’s book, and featuring an unforgettable score by the Sherman Brothers ( _Mary Poppins_), _ChittyChitty Bang Bang_ is one family-friendly blockbuster that audiences will find “Truly Scrumptious”.

An eccentric inventor, Caractacus Potts sets about restoring an old race car from a scrap heap with the help of his children Jeremy and Jemima. They soon discover the car has magical properties including the ability to float and take flight. Trouble occurs when the evil Baron Bomburst desires the magic car for himself. The family joins forces with Truly Scrumptious and batty Grandpa.

Event Type: Theatre

Running Time: 150 minutes

Company: JGH Associates

Additional Information

Wheelchairs

Dates & Times

Price: £10 to £25
